items.title: Diesel Generator 14kW Kubota V1505 w Newage Alternator
items.ai_notes: [Kubota V1505 diesel generator] Used industrial generators are valuable but require a specific buyer with the capacity to transport and use them.
items.description:
I have for sale a used diesel generator. The engine is a 4 cyl Kubota V1505 and it runs at 1800 RPM. The generator is a Newage BCI164D1. This is a 12 lead generator so it can be configured for 277/480Vac 3 Phase, 120/208Vac 3 Phase or 120/240 single phase voltage output. In 3 phase configuration this generator will output @ 14kW. It will be about 10kW for single phase as the generator head is derated for single phase use. This setup has a brand new radiator, air cleaner, muffler and fuel filter installed. It has an auto start controller on it. Just push start and it will run the glow plugs, crank & start the engine along with monitor for safety shutdown. I have load tested the unit for over an hour at loads between 12-14kW and can demonstrate that for any buyer. This weighs 600 lbs and is approx. 44 long x 26 wide and 33" to the top of the radiator.
Would be great for irrigation units, car haulers, mobile mechanic, farm trailer etc.
Asking $ 1200 Cash obo. I have a forklift I can load it with. call Zach @ nine one three 429-5980

items.title: REDUCED - "MINT" Nikon D810 (USA) SLR Camera
items.ai_notes: [Nikon D810 DSLR Camera] High-end DSLR with low shutter count. Condition appears excellent.
items.description:
Mint "USA" Nikon D810.  New these went for $2800 + tax.  This is the final reduction I will make on this camera.
Shutter count/actuations are a very low 17,057 as of 4/22/2026.  Nikon says they are good for at least 200,000+.  Most get about 300,000+.  It has taken me almost five years to get to this shutter count and I am a semi-pro who uses it for all my indoor studio shots.
This camera has 36.3 MP (you will probably never need to go over 8-10 MP for incredible photos), which can easily be enlarged more than you will ever probably need.
I only use this camera indoors in my home studio.  Non-smoking, dog-free environment and kept in a safe with humidity control.  I take great care of my equipment.
Check out the photos.  I take very detailed shots so you can see what you are buying.
The Dr. Pepper photo was taken with this camera using a 105mm macro lens (lit by studio strobes) in my home studio.  The bowl of soup photo was taken with this camera using a 50mm lens (lit by studio strobes) in my home studio and the "hamburger" photo was also taken with this camera using a 105mm macro lens (lit by studio strobes) in my home studio as well.
The camera looks virtually brand new.
Included:
Box
Manuals
Battery
Battery charger
Strap
View NX2 installer CD
Original warranty card (Proof of USA Model)
Missing a short USB cable (UC-E22 cable)... about $25 if you want one.  Not needed unless you want to hook directly to your computer.
Be careful of non-USA Nikon products (grey market items).  Nikon will not repair or work on them if you ever need work done on it.

items.title: Heavy Duty Steel Industrial Workbench / Teardown Table
items.ai_notes: [Heavy Duty Steel Industrial Workbench] Vintage industrial workbench with heavy steel construction; shows expected patina and surface wear.
items.description:
​Selling a vintage, commercial-grade heavy steel industrial shop workbench. This is a fully welded, bulletproof unit built to handle punishing garage, farm, or fabrication work—way tougher than any modern bolt-together bench you’ll find in a big box store.
​Key Features:
58 x 30 inches. Shelving 43 x 26 inches.
3 foot high
​Fluid Teardown Lip: Features a built-in tapered drop-gate / pour spout on the right side. Perfect for tearing down engines, transmissions, or differentials and draining oils/solvents cleanly into a bucket below.
​Containment Walls: High steel backsplashes and side lips on three sides keep parts, loose hardware, and messy liquids safely on the table.
​Massive Storage: Includes two deep, heavy-gauge steel undershelves to hold heavy toolboxes, parts, or equipment.
​Built Like a Tank: Gusseted corner braces and heavy-duty steel construction. It has an awesome authentic patina but is structurally rock-solid with no soft spots.
​Perfect for a mechanic shop, farm garage, DIY fabricator, or even cleaned up for a rugged industrial-style potting bench.
​Price: $200 cash
​Location: Pleasanton, KS
​Pickup: Local pickup only. You will need a truck/trailer and a couple of sets of hands to load it, as this is solid, heavy steel.
​Message me to set up a time to come grab it!

I have for sale!
A 1971 Suzuki TS50 Goucho in excellent condition, Clean title in hand if you’d like to tag and use on the streets, comes with original key, leaks no fluids, repainted yellow. items.title: 24ft Dual-Axle Trailer Frame – Rolling Chassis / Tiny Home Base / Project
items.ai_notes: [24ft Dual-Axle Trailer Frame] Rolling chassis without title; jack is non-functional and wiring needs attention.
items.description:
Looking for a rock-solid foundation for a tiny home, heavy-duty flatbed, utility hauler, or farm trailer? This is a 24-foot dual-axle trailer frame built with heavy steel. It has great bones and is ready for your custom deck or build.
​Specs & Features:
​Length: 24 feet
​Axles: Dual axle setup (excellent stability and weight distribution)
​Tires: Tires are in good shape and holding air perfectly. It is a rolling chassis.
​Coupler: Standard ball hitch with safety chains included.
​Structure: Straight steel frame. Typical surface rust from sitting, but structurally solid and sound.
​Current Condition (Please Read):
​Title: No title. Sold with a Bill of Sale only. Excellent for farm use, private property, or a stationary build like a tiny home/cabin.
​Jack: Non-functional. You will need a floor jack or a bottle jack to assist with hitching it up to your truck.
​Wiring: Basic wiring harness is run through the frame but untested. Plan on updating the lights.
​Buyer Requirements:
Bring a truck with a matching ball and a jack to lift the tongue onto your hitch. Ready to roll.
​Location: Pleasanton kansas
Payment: Cash only.

items.title: 🍦 RARE Vintage Dairy Queen "Cone & Lips" Single-Piece Sign Face
items.ai_notes: [Vintage Dairy Queen Sign Face] Rare vintage sign face; bottom section is detached, requiring repair.
items.description:
Massive opportunity for a serious collector or reseller. This is a rare, single-piece 3D vacuum-formed pylon sign face from the iconic "Brazier" era of Dairy Queen. Unlike smaller versions, the 7ft cone and the 4.5ft tall lips logo are molded into one continuous, architectural panel. Finding a single-piece unit of this scale that hasn't shattered is extremely rare.
​Measurements:
​Overall Width: Approx. 7+ Feet.
​Lips Section: 4.5 Feet Tall x 7 Feet Wide.
​Soft Serve Cone: 7 Feet Tall.
​Depth: 8–12 inch 3D embossed profile.
​Collector Features:
​Crack-Free: Sign is fully intact withe the exception of the bottom portion detached, with no cracks, which is highly unusual for its age.
​Diagnostic Base Included: I am including the detached lower portion of the sign. It features the authentic 1950s/60s blue-and-white striped "Brazier" color scheme.  This identifies the set as a true mid-century survivor rather than a later discard.
​Project Potential: Perfect for a high-end shop display or man cave. Ready to be cleaned and backlit with a simple DIY LED setup.
​Terms:
​Price: $600 cash. FIRM
Priced fairly for a reseller to double their investment or a collector to get a "statement piece" below auction rates.
​Trades: Open to trades valued at $800
​Pickup: This is a massive, single-piece unit. You will need a flatbed trailer or a full-sized truck with a rack. Located in the Pleasanton area.

items.ai_notes: [American Blue/White rabbit] Pet/meat quality rabbit pricing.
items.description:
Purebred Heritage Breed American Blue or White rabbits. This is a very rare Homesteader breed known for good mothering, large litters, good temperament, nice personality, and heat tolerance. Easy breeders and fast growers.
Kits weaning soon.  $50 for show quality and $25 for pet or meat quality. Great meat production. Wean weight 4-5 pounds at 8 weeks. Fryer weight 5-6 pounds at 10 weeks . Fast growth! American Blue or white rabbits are a very rare Heritage breed. Help preserve them. We had parents entered at ARBA national convention last year and place 4th or better in each category.  These make just as much meat as New Zealands but more fur and bigger litters.
Text 816 seven two six, 9626 for pickup. It's better to text than email as I don't check the email that often.

items.title: Duck or Rabbit Meat
items.ai_notes: [Duck meat] Price per duck for pasture-raised meat.
items.description:
Duck meat and rabbit meat. Eating eggs. Pasture raised or free range or ethically housed. Processed under USDA small grower exemption. Ready for on-farm-pickup-only in downtown KCK by Donnelly College. $25 per duck for pasture-raised, free-range meat. $25 per rabbit. 5 for $100, mix and match duck and rabbit. Buy 3 rabbits and 2 ducks for $100. $8 a dozen on duck eating eggs. $7 a pound on rabbit meat. Bulk discounts available on eggs or meat. Fill your fridge or freezer.  If you want fresh, never-frozen, we can notify you about processing days. Duck is Alpha-Gal safe.
"The other red meat...." Ducks are all-dark meat, dark breasts, and very rich. Black ducks like Swedes and Cayugas have the richest flavor of all.  Come to KCK, tour our urban farm, explore the wetlands, and come see all the cute babies. Text 816-726-nine six two six. You can email but I don't check it as often.

items.title: Rabbit Manure
items.ai_notes: [Bag of rabbit manure fertilizer] Valued at the $12 per bag price mentioned in description.
items.description:
Rabbit manure is a great cold manure that can go straight onto gardens. Low price! $12 for a contractor cleanup bag that weighs 40 pounds. Rabbit Manure Fertilizer – Garden Ready, No Composting Needed. Fresh rabbit manure available from healthy, well-fed rabbits. This is one of the best natural fertilizers you can use. Perfect for vegetable gardens, raised beds, fruit trees, and soil building. High in nitrogen and nutrients, but gentle enough that it won’t burn plants. Also great for improving soil structure and water retention.
This batch includes a mix of rabbit pellets, composted rabbit pellets, and worm castings, as many of our cages have earth contact so red wrigglers help to digest the manure before selling. This helps add organic matter and improves long-term soil health. Ideal for gardeners who want a natural, sustainable alternative to chemical fertilizers.
Bagged up and ready for pickup. Located in Kansas City, KS.
Text

and let me know how much you need and when you’d like to pick up. I have 16 bags left.

items.ai_notes: [Cayuga ducklings] Livestock pricing is standard for hatchlings.
items.description:
Show-quality Cayuga potential ducklings—larger, hardier, and bred for both eggs and meat. Strong, fast-growing birds that outperform typical hatchery stock. These ducklings come from award-winning lines with multiple champion titles at regional and national shows. At the same time, they are selected for real-world performance—excellent egg layers, good meat size, and hardy birds that do well in backyard and small farm environments. Great for homesteads, beginners, or anyone looking for productive, low-maintenance ducks that are already set up to thrive. Cayugas are known for their rich flavor, strong laying ability, and adaptability to different climates.
We also have purebred Blue Solid and Silver Solid Ducklings.
Hatch dates every two weeks with local pickup in Kansas City, KS. Hatchlings are $10 each straight run. The quality genetics are worth it! Hatching eggs are also available for $30 per dozen. Limited number available each hatch—text to reserve yours.

items.title: Engineered White Oak Hardwood Flooring - 7.25" Wide Plank - $1.99/sf -
items.ai_notes: [Engineered White Oak Hardwood Flooring] Price is per square foot for new flooring. Flooring is a high-demand commodity.
items.description:
If you want the look of wide plank white oak without paying retail prices, this is it.
We have 21,928 square feet of Noble's Way engineered white oak in the Winter River finish priced at $1.99 per square foot. This is first quality, U.S.-made flooring -- not seconds, not overrun junk, not a discontinued line nobody wanted. It's a legitimate deal on a legitimate product.
The 7.25" wide plank gives you that open, modern look you see in high-end homes and design magazines. The Winter River color runs light and cool -- a whitewashed, natural oak tone that works with gray walls, blue walls, warm neutrals, and everything in between. The wirebrushed surface texture adds depth and hides everyday wear. The micro bevel edge gives each board a clean, defined look that reads as intentional, not cheap.
The specs matter on engineered, and these are solid: 3/8" thick construction, low gloss finish, and a 25-year residential warranty. Wide planks at this thickness are designed to be glued down or floated, making this a practical choice for slabs and above-grade installations alike.
At $1.99 a square foot for first quality white oak this wide, you are not going to find this price at a flooring showroom. Retail on comparable 7" and wider engineered white oak runs $6 to $10 per square foot regularly.
Call us to check availability or get a shipping quote: 800-253-2728
More photos and details at ReallyCheapFloors.com
